name: GULF RESOURCES, INC.
summary: Gulf Resources, Inc. is a Nevada-incorporated holding company operating through Chinese subsidiaries. It manufactures and trades bromine and crude salt, produces natural gas, manufactures chemical products used in oil and gas field exploration and papermaking, and produces materials for human and animal antibiotics. All products are sold exclusively within the People's Republic of China. Operations are centered in Shandong Province and Sichuan Province, China.

products.name: Bromine
products.description: Manufactured and traded bromine extracted from brine resources in China.

products.name: Crude Salt
products.description: Produced and traded crude salt from salt fields in Shandong Province, China.

products.name: Natural Gas
products.description: Exploration and production of natural gas from brine resources in China.

products.name: Chemical Products for Oil and Gas Exploration
products.description: Specialty chemicals used in oil and gas field exploration operations.

products.name: Papermaking Chemical Agents
products.description: Chemical agents manufactured for use in the papermaking industry.

products.name: Materials for Human and Animal Antibiotics
products.description: Antibiotic-related materials manufactured for human and animal pharmaceutical use.
